zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy de Tregoz於大約1202年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德時，她的父親Robert de Tregoz I35歲，母親Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham25歲。她於大約1225年與John le Strange III在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1294年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾享年93歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy de Tregoz于大约1202年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德时，她的父亲Robert de Tregoz I35岁，母亲Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham25岁。她于大约1225年与John le Strange III在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1294年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tregoz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from Treago in Crantock (Cornwall). The placename derives from Middle Cornish tre ‘estate, farmstead’ + uncertain final element.
Altered form of French   Tricot   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. It was reportedly brought to North America from England. Today it is found mainly in PA and OH. Compare   Trago  .
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Trago
meanings: Variant of   Trego  , a surname of Cornish and French origin. In the US, it is found mainly in PA and OH.

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy de Tregoz was born about 1202, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Tregoz I, was 35 and her mother, Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham, was 25. She married John le Strange III about 1225, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1294, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy de Tregoz est née environ 1202, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Tregoz I, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Sibyl d’Ewyas Lady of Burneham, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John le Strange III environ 1225, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1294, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy de Tregoz um 1202 in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Tregoz I 35 und ihre Mutter Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham 25. Sie hat um 1225 in Shropshire, England John le Strange III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1294 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy de Tregoz è nata il circa 1202 nel Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert de Tregoz I, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato John le Strange III circa 1225, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1294, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy de Tregozが約1202年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルドで生まれた時，父Robert de Tregoz Iは35歳，母Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burnehamは25歳であった。約1225年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでJohn le Strange IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1294年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで93歳で死去した。

ko.Knockin, Cheswardine, Shropshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 노킨 인 오스베스트리

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy de Tregoz(이)가 대략 1202년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Tregoz I(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1225년 영국 슈럽실르에서 John le Strange III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1294년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy de Tregoz nasceu aproximadamente 1202, em Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Tregoz I, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John le Strange III aproximadamente 1225, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1294, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 93 anos.

ru.Knockin, Cheswardine, Shropshire, Englan: ноккин ин освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ноккин ин освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Knockin, Oswestry, Shropshire, England: ноккин ин освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy de Tregoz родилась около 1202 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Tregoz I было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John le Strange III около 1225 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1294 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 93 лет.

es.Knockin, Cheswardine, Shropshire, Englan: Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Knockin, Oswestry, Shropshire, England: Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucy de Tregoz nació aproximadamente 1202, en Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Tregoz I, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham, tenía 25 años. Se casó con John le Strange III aproximadamente 1225, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1294, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 93 años.
